title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Oliveboard - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Oliveboard - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Oliveboard invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Oliveboard:
Oliveboard is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oliveboard!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
